title: (Faster) Happy Ghast Mayhem
description: Make the happy ghast faster when you ride it, and slower when you've dismounted.
body:
# About this Pack

This pack allows for the Happy Ghast to be faster when the player mounts it, and slower when the player is dismounted. This makes it more useful for exploring, without making the mounting process more challenging. In addition, you don't lose the ambiance of happy ghasts floating around.

Have a request for this pack, or others? Let me know in the discord!

# FAQs


### Can I get this for a snapshot version?
YES! I don't normally release snapshot versions online, but if you'd like to get this datapack/mod made for a specific snapshot or maintained for snapshot versions, please join the discord and let me know!

# Join Us in the Root Community

To report bugs, suggest ideas, and follow new data pack and mod development, join us in the [Root Community](https://rootapp.gg/AC2j8mo1jgqeyZuytuRzfA)!
